Written in small naskh in black ink with use of red. European glazed paper. Titles of section written on the upper margin (see fol. 73b). Catchword on the verso of each leaf. Important marginal annotations apparently mainly from the same hand as the main text, attributed to the author, Ḥusayn al-Khalkālī, MullāhʹZādah, Mīr Fakhr, ʻAbd al-Raḥīm Shirwānī, Naṣr Allāh, etc. or excerpted from Sharḥ-i Ṭawāliʻ-i Iṣfahānī, Sharḥ Hikmat al-ʻAyn, etc. (also on a small piece of paper placed between fol. 131 and 132). Short note on "maʻná al-aʻamm" and "maʻná al-akhaṣṣ" on the pastedown of the upper cover. Table of contents on fol. 1a-b. On fol. 2a: Kabīkaj ; several inscriptions (a note on the etymology of the word "falsafah", an excerpt from Ḥāshiyat-Mīr Fakhr, etc.) ; obliterated ownership statement ; obliterated seal. Foliation in red ink using Arabic numerals (starts on fol. 3a). Inscription in Arabic script on a label pasted on the upper cover: "Ḥikmah 29". Inscription in Arabic script on a label pasted on the pastedown of the upper cover: "891/2 ḥāʼ". Some loose leaves.|Acquired from Abraham Shalom Yahuda, 1942.

[1834 or 5], with seal. Acquired from Abraham Shalom Yahuda, 1942.

Three reading statements dated 1102 [1690 or 91] on the fly-leaf before the lower cover (fol. 212b), signed al-Ḥājj Aḥmad ibn al-ḥājj Sulaymān al-ʻAlwānī, al-Sayyid Zayn al-ʻĀbidīn Ibn al-shaykh Ḥasan al-ʻAlwānī, al-Sayyid ʻAbd al-Qādir ibn al-shaykh Aḥmad al-ʻAlwānī.
